since_last: 51% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +4.67%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 51% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.08% · BTC +0.18% · Gold +1.51% · Nasdaq100 -0.93%. 51% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +4.67%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +4.67%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.63%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -9.84%
cards.body: Leaders: DV +8.29%, PUBM +8.08%, MGNI +7.62%, NOW +7.46%, RXRX +6.59%. Laggards: TER -9.84%, VRT -7.47%, HPE -7.38%, MRVL -6.24%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.48% at $153.73
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.48% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
